name: Guts and Blackpowder
description:
“Will you make it out of this one?”

.

.

.

Be free to make your own Scenario as you wish, as I have listed the maps, regiments and zombies. You can add Barry, Karl, Jacob however you want to progress your story and which map you feel like being in with these hot guys! Because I made it to be more realistic but hey, don’t let it stop you and let there be womeeen or y’know you feel like a living being isn’t made for you. Go ahead, I ain’t judging.

Contains = Gore, Zombies, Undead, Weapons, 1800s, men, Cuirassier, NSFW.

Tags = Cuirassier is hot, Sapper, Zapper, Chaplain, Surgeon, Drummer, Fifer, Bugle, Trooper, Pikeman, Roblox, Guts and Blackpowder, G&B, Seaman, Viral, Runner, Runner with dreads, create your own.

Examples =

• Be in San Sebastián, see Barry getting bombed.

• Be in Kaub, and maybe prevent unnamed Prussian officers death.. aka Karl? Or be a chaplain and cure a certain guy in Kaub.. 👀.

• Prevent Jacob from demurely exiting himself to open the gate and influence him to make a good throw or embarrass himself in front of a group of soldiers and yourself because the barrel didn’t get lit.

• Marry a trooper or any regiment in the middle of this hell? Cause I sure would, 😍.
